creator: wrichard@trivalley.com
text:
(cc'd to libxml2 port maintainer gnome@freebsd.org)

According to posts on comp.windows.x.kde, libxml2 2.4.9 and later are 
broken, at least for kde2.

I was able to resolve this PR by regressing ports/libxml2/* back to 
2.4.6; kdelibs2 is compiling just fine now.

If 2.4.10 doesn't break gnome but does break kde, maybe a new port can 
be created which will stay at 2.4.6, and kdelibs2 can depend on it.

WR
